title: Equal Access to Contraception for Veterans Act
short_title: Equal Access to Contraception for Veterans Act
stage_label: Referred to the Subcommittee on Health.
crs_summary: Equal Access to Contraception for Veterans Act This bill prohibits the Department of Veterans Affairs from requiring payment from a veteran for any contraceptive item that is required to be covered by health insurance plans without a cost-sharing requirement.
last_action_text: Referred to the Subcommittee on Health.
